title: check-untested-p0 expected output
description: Asserts that /personal-workflow check Step 18 correctly flags a P0 story as [UNTESTED] when no matching AC token appears in TEST-SPEC's ac_set. Fixture: SPEC has P0 #1, #2; TEST-SPEC contains AC-1 only. Schema requires overall=FAIL, p0_stories.1.covered=true, p0_stories.2.covered=false, untested_p0_stories contains 2.

overall.description: Must be FAIL — at least one P0 is untested in this fixture.

untested_p0_stories.description: Must contain at least the integer 2 (P0 #2 has no AC coverage).

ac_set.description: Must contain AC-1; the fixture's TEST-SPEC has one row with AC-1.
